scripts.clean:dist: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');for(const n of fs.readdirSync('packages')){const d=p.join('packages',n,'dist');if(fs.existsSync(d))fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});}"
scripts.publish:npm: pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run build && pnpm publish -r --access public --no-git-checks --filter '@open-os/types' --filter '@open-os/kernel' --filter '@open-os/mcp' --filter '@open-os/a2a' --filter '@open-os/sdk' --filter '@open-os/cli'
